resourcesHub.title: Resource center
resourcesHub.subtitle: Processes, training, and coaching for a consistent elite client experience.
resourcesHub.salesProcessBody: The full Maison Auclaire journey step by step—from lead capture to final delivery. See which CRM stage matches each action and navigate the client lifecycle with confidence.
resourcesHub.academyBody: Exclusive training for expert closers: coaching techniques, quizzes, and diamond expertise.
resourcesHub.flashQuoteBody: Estimate a project in seconds—ideal in client meetings to give an accurate price range from the catalog.
resourcesHub.catalogBody: Browse Auclaire models and price for your clients. Add new options over time to grow the knowledge base.

salesProcessPage.title: Auclaire sales process
salesProcessPage.subtitle: Full guide for the team—from lead capture to retention.
salesProcessPage.flowLine: Lead → Sales → Qualification → Design brief → Secretary → Manufacturer (CAD+price) → Sales → Close → Payment → Production → Delivery → Client review

step1.title: Lead intake
details: A lead enters the system (ads, DM, website, referral).
They are automatically added to the pipeline.
They are assigned to a salesperson.
step1.hint: 👉 From here, the salesperson takes over.

step2.title: Sales qualification
details: Contact the client.
Understand their needs (ring, budget, timeline, stone type, inspiration).
Confirm the project is serious.
step2.objective: Ensure the client is ready to move to design, give a final price estimate, and validate design and budget.

step3.title: Design brief sent
details: When the project is clear, sales sends a complete design brief.
Detail: model, size, stone, metal, references (e.g. engagement ring / size 7 / 14k white gold / center stone: oval 2ct / pave round half band / engraving: 20/06/1985).
Create the task in GHL, assigned to client and secretary.
step3.hint: 👉 The brief then goes to the secretary.

step4.title: Handoff to manufacturer (CAD phase)
details: The secretary checks the brief is complete and enters it in the internal system.
Sends the link to the manufacturer.
The manufacturer creates the CAD and calculates the true final price.
Returns CAD + price to the secretary.
step4.hint: 👉 The secretary then sends back to sales.

step5.title: Client presentation + closing
details: Sales presents the CAD to the client.
Explains details, adjusts if needed.
Sends the quote.

step6.title: Deposit or full payment
details: When the client accepts, they pay a deposit or the full amount.
The secretary confirms payment.
She sends the project to production with the manufacturer.

step7.title: Production
details: The manufacturer starts production and crafts the piece.
When done, they notify the secretary.
The secretary notifies sales.

step8.title: Delivery + final payment
details: Sales arranges delivery.
Collects any remaining balance.
Ensures the client is satisfied.

step9.title: Post-sale
details: After delivery, the community manager contacts the client.
Asks for a review.
Collects photos / testimonial.
step9.objective: Build social proof, fuel marketing, and grow Auclaire’s reputation.

edu.gemstonesTipBody: Diamond remains the #1 choice for engagement rings (10/10 hardness = everyday wear). If the client wants a colored stone, recommend sapphire or ruby (9 hardness). Emerald is stunning but fragile — always mention impact risk.
edu.gemstonesQuizPrompt: A client wants a colored stone. His partner is a nurse and works with her hands. What do you recommend?
edu.settingsTipBody: Halo is your closing tool: a 0.8 ct in halo can look as big as a 1.2 ct solitaire. Hidden Halo appeals to clients who want discreet luxury.
edu.settingsQuizPrompt: A client on a tight budget wants the ring to look as big as possible. Which setting?
edu.hisHersTipBody: Wedding bands are a natural cross-sell. Mention them at the engagement ring close. Often +30% on the order.
edu.hisHersQuizPrompt: When is the ideal moment to propose wedding bands?
edu.fourCStrategyBody: To maximize look at a fixed budget: Cut > Carat > Color > Clarity. Never sacrifice cut.
edu.fourCQuizPrompt: Client with $5,000 wants the largest diamond possible with maximum brilliance. Your strategy?
edu.anatomyLexicon: Mastering this vocabulary instantly establishes your authority as a jewellery expert.
edu.anatomyImageMissing: Image not found. Please place anatomie-bague.png in the public folder.
edu.metalsAllergyBody: Some clients are allergic to nickel (common in commercial white gold). If sensitive, steer them toward:
edu.metalsQuizScenario: A client says her skin is very sensitive and she often reacts to jewellery. She wants a white, bright ring. Which metal do you recommend?

guides.philosophyQuote: “We all eat at the same table.”
guides.philosophyBody: This means shared success, a healthy culture without toxic competition, clear rules, and mutual commitment. Ambassadors earn well because the brand earns well. This is not an open affiliate program — it’s a controlled growth lever.
profileSoughtItems: Polished image and discreet luxury positioning
profileExcludedItems: Quick cash at the expense of brand image
roleAmbassadorItems: Handing off the lead or the 3D configuration.
You represent the brand — you don’t have to be a technical expert.
roleAuclaireItems: Official visuals and luxury brand framework.
Full handling of manufacturing, delivery, warranties, and closing.
guides.simulatorIntro: See how much you can earn on a single sale depending on your level of involvement.
guides.simFootnoteVente: You run the sale end to end (3D Studio)
guides.excellenceBody: Being an Auclaire ambassador isn’t only selling jewellery: it’s representing a Maison that stands for bespoke work, accessible luxury, and uncompromising quality.
guides.excellenceQuote: “We don’t sell products — we create legacies.”
goldenRulesItems: Keep a professional, courteous, expert tone.
forbiddenItems: Undermine the brand with aggressive discounting.
guides.studio3dBody: Unlike traditional jewellers, you have access to our 3D configurator. Use it to show clients they can create a one-of-a-kind piece in real time.
guides.ambassadorAdvantageBody: Access to preferential Ambassador pricing for purely personal use. Huge leverage on your own ring (e.g. $2,500 retail → $1,650 for you).
guides.apporteurDesc: Ideal if you lack time or technical depth. Pass the lead — we handle the rest.
apporteurSteps: The client engages with your content.
The Auclaire team takes over (design, quote, closing).
If they buy, you earn your commission.
guides.venteCompleteDesc: For those who want to maximize income and master bespoke selling from A to Z.
venteCompleteSteps: You configure the piece with the client (3D Studio).
You give an accurate price estimate.
guides.nailSalonBody: This can be very lucrative. In a nail salon, clients look at their hands for an hour — the perfect moment to let them try virtually or see ring models.
nailSalonItems: Ask the owner to host a display or luxury business cards (QR code).
Offer the owner a referral fee on each sale (revenue share).
The owner becomes your business referrer; you become their partner jeweller.
socialItems: Show 3D designs rotating in video (wow effect).
marketplaceItems: Move the chat quickly to a call or 3D demo.
